text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Okay, the butter is melted. What comes next
again?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Braids
text_block_list.text: O-oh! I'll put in the carrot powder now!
choice_data_list: I'll get the cookie cutters out.
I'll get the cookie cutters out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer is helping some younger students
bake in the kitchen. It all started when her
curiosity got the best of her.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Hair Tied Back
text_block_list.text: N-no way! Palmer?! Wh-what are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Trainer and I heard the commotion, so we came
to see what you guys were up to in the kitchen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: So, what's the sitch?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Hair Tied Back
text_block_list.text:
Ah, well, um... We're trying to bake gifts for
someone...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Braids
text_block_list.text:
But we've never made cookies before. We
accidentally burnt a batch and started freaking
out... Sorry for causing such a ruckus!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Hey, it's all G! Here, let me help!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Seeing you all busy and stuff makes me wanna
join in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So that's how we started baking with them, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That should do for the dough. Now let's roll it
out!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Braids
text_block_list.text:
Yuck! Why is it so salty?! Oh no... I must've put
salt in the dough instead of sugar...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! It happens! This is your first time baking
cookies, after all. But I think they'll still make for
great gifts.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The salty cookies will be great for sodium
replenishment, and they'll be a treat for the taste
buds in combo with the sweet ones I'm making!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Braids
text_block_list.text: Palmer... You're the best!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
There, got it. You can move now! Hehe! I can't
believe you didn't notice you had flour on your
nose.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You're so dialed in, it's adorable! I'd legit give
you the world, girl. You're just too presh.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Hair Tied Back
text_block_list.text: Y-y-you would?! Swoon...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: There, they're ready! Okay now, say "ahhh."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Whatcha think? Pretty good for a trial batch,
yeah?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Braids
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, ma'am! They're very good! So good!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Your face is all red... Oh no, was that still
hot when I fed it to you?! I'm so sorry!
choice_data_list:
(She really has no idea what she's doing to
those poor girls...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: All done! Whoa! They're picture perfect!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Now all you gotta do is muster up the courage to
give them to your special person! I hope whoever
you're giving these to likes them!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Hair Tied Back
text_block_list.text:
Okay... Gotta muster up the courage...
U-um, Palmer!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Please accept our cookies!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wait, what? You're giving them to me?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Hair Tied Back
text_block_list.text:
Yes, um... You see, we wanted to make cookies
for you.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Hair Tied Back
text_block_list.text:
I know it's kinda weird to get a gift that you
helped make...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Hair Tied Back
text_block_list.text:
But... we had so much fun baking with you. It was
a real treat working alongside you! I guess in a
way, this is a thank-you gift, too...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wait, no cap? Are you two really?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Omigosh, I'm sooo honored! Thanks a mil!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I could tell exactly how much love and care you
both put into these just from watching you work...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the cookies and the great memories
too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'll treasure—and savor—your precious feelings!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Hair Tied Back
text_block_list.text:
Urk! M-my heart... can't handle it! P-Palmer... You
feed us fans so well...
choice_data_list: It takes stamina to fangirl this hard, huh?
It takes stamina to fangirl this hard, huh?
It takes guts to lay the praise on that thick.
It takes guts to lay the praise on that thick.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Hair Tied Back
text_block_list.text:
Urk! M-my heart... can't handle it! P-Palmer... You
feed us fans so well...
choice_data_list: It takes stamina to fangirl this hard, huh?
It takes stamina to fangirl this hard, huh?
It takes guts to lay the praise on that thick.
It takes guts to lay the praise on that thick.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Stamina? Oh, you mean like how long they spent
cooking?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh man, look at you. Your forehead's all sweaty.
Here, I'll help you wipe that off!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Hair Tied Back
text_block_list.text: E-eep! I-it's okay! I can do it myself!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Hair Tied Back
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Last I heard, there's a rumor going around that
Mejiro Palmer's no-holds-barred fanservice is
bewitching fans left and right in the academy...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Hair Tied Back
text_block_list.text: F-for sure! You get it, don't you, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Braids
text_block_list.text:
It's wonderful how nice yet oblivious she is! Her
racing is incredible too, of course, and I just want
to cheer for her forever!
choice_data_list: I'll do everything I can to help her, too!
I'll do everything I can to help her, too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you guys are so fired up! I dunno what for,
but thanks, I guess?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Last I heard, there's a rumor going around that
Mejiro Palmer's no-holds-barred fanservice is
bewitching fans left and right in the academy...
